task: Check the status of bus S92 for any disruptions on new.mta.info.
final_result_response:
Based on my thorough check of the MTA website (new.mta.info), here is the status of bus **S92**:

**No disruptions or planned service changes** are currently reported for the S92 bus route.

I verified this by:
1. Checking the **Service Status** section on the MTA homepage under the **Bus** tab — the S92 is not listed among any disrupted routes.
2. Going to the **Planned Service Changes** page, selecting the **Bus** filter, expanding **Staten Island**, and specifically filtering for the **S92** route — the page explicitly states: **"No planned service changes on S92."**

The S92 bus (a Staten Island route) appears to be operating normally with no active alerts or planned disruptions at this time.
